title: A Duel Against the Town
description: On pages 13–16, a duel against the town as while the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters.
scene: A Duel Against the Town. While the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What!? How do you know the name of our organization!?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Back when I was in the same line of business as you,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A certain organ- zation tried to scout me but I refused, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: ...an organization whose members don't know a thing about each other's real identities,

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: and must refer each other by their code- names.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: and of course, the boss' location and identity are a mystery as well.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: A criminal organization that asks for complete obedience from its members: Baroque works.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Heh... was that supp- used to be a secret?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is quite a shock... but if he knows our secret, then we have no choice but to eliminate him...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Another tomb- stone,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Must be added to cactus rock tonight...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's gone!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where'd he go!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: shall we get things started?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: You fools!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He disappeared again! He's too fast!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Hurry up and kill him already! He's only one swordsm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you sure,

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: that you want to add only one tombstone tonight?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There He is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: S-Stop you fools! Are you planning to shoot me too!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I said stop!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a duel against the town. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
